items.name: glow-backdrop
items.title: Glow Backdrop
items.description: A decorative backdrop with an optional centered glow and gradient fades.

items.title: Kbd
items.description: A keyboard key indicator component for displaying shortcuts.

items.title: Sparkle Spinner
items.description: A custom SVG loading spinner with twinkling dots on a deterministic loop.

items.name: text-shimmer
items.title: Text Shimmer
items.description: An animated shimmer effect over text, with light/dark mode and color variants.

items.name: copy-button
items.title: Copy Button
items.description: A button that copies text to the clipboard with a transient success state.

items.name: icon-wrapper
items.title: Icon Wrapper
items.description: A decorative wrapper for icons with a gradient background variant.

items.name: marker
items.title: Marker
items.description: A marker component for timeline-like layouts, with separator and border variants.

items.name: stepper
items.title: Stepper
items.description: A compact horizontal step progress indicator.

items.name: search-input
items.title: Search Input
items.description: An input with a leading search icon, controlled value/onChange.
